message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="Step 3 complete, CI green, shutting down">
**Step 3: Contexts is COMPLETE.** CI green, 9/9 consensus, commit pushed. Thank you all for thorough reviews.

The team will now shut down for this task. Great work everyone.
</teammate-message>

content.text: Step 3 complete. CI green, 9/9 consensus achieved, commit `21cfe18` pushed to `origin/main`.

input.content:
Acknowledged. Step 3 (Contexts) is complete. Summary of what was delivered:

- Domain: ContextId, ContextName (with @ normalization), Context, ContextNameError
- DB: contexts table with user/name unique constraint
- Infrastructure: Full CRUD repository
- Services: add, list, update, delete + seed defaults on registration
- Routes: 5 handlers with HTMX progressive enhancement
- Templates: contexts list, inline edit, item partial
- CSS: 168 lines of component styles matching design tokens
- Refactor: Extracted shared HTMX helpers to routes/mod.rs
- A11y: aria-labels on all actions including Cancel
- Tests: 15 unit + 18 integration + 2 e2e (including a11y scan)
- Glossary and deferred items updated

Ready to shut down.
input.summary: Acknowledged, Step 3 complete, ready to shut down
